title: 検証～ネコ語は実在するのか？

text_block_list.text:
Hearing a strange voice coming from behind the
main hall, I head around to check it out...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Meow mew mew! Mew mew mew! Meeeooow!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there you go! That's it! You're sounding
way better!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. I'm just giving Spe a little lesson in
cat language.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I heard something strange and came to
investigate. And here you are, acting as strange
as you sound.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Air Groove. You wouldn't by chance be
interested too?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ridiculous. There's no way cats could have a
language remotely similar to ours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oho, you think it's impossible? Well, how about a
demonstration?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is your chance, Spe. Go ahead and try that
cat greeting I taught you earlier.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Got it! Um... Meeew.

text_block_list.name: Relaxing Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I did it, Sei! The cat answered me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All it did was meow back. I hardly think that could
be considered a meaningful exchange of
language.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh. Why don't you go on and give it a try then?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph... fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Mew!

Unfortunately, after hearing Air Groove's meow,
the cat runs off.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?!

Air Groove tries a few more meows... but the cat
simply runs away each time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Urgh! What's going on here?! Why did it meow at
everyone but me?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think the problem's your pronunciation. Not to be rude, but it was a little presumptuous for you to think you could simply copy the sound.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wha... Are you mocking me? This is simply inexcusable!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's not it, Vice President. I'm just
surprised you messed up a simple "hello" is all...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'd be even better than me if you
practiced a bit, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. I'll have to show you what happens
when the Empress gets serious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ooh! How exciting! Say "meow meow!"
choice_data_list: Sky, why don't you get serious too?
You could start by teaching her the basics.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's right. If you're going to claim that cat
language is real, it would be more effective to
start with an example.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, whatever you saaay... Let's see... Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Mew mew mew. Meow, meeeooow. Meow meow
meow?

text_block_list.name: Relaxing Stray Cat
text_block_list.text:
...Mew. Mew mew. Mew meeew! Meow meow
meow.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the?! Are you really communicating?!

Seiun Sky showcases her surprisingly impressive
fluency in cat language, leaving everyone stunned
as they watch.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Mraow, mraow! Nya-ha-ha! Mew mew mew.
Meooow, meow...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Sei? I think that might be enough—are you
listening?

Seiun Sky and the cat she's talking with both
suddenly stand up and swiftly dash away...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei?! Did you turn into a cat?!

When Seiun Sky returns, she claims she can't
remember anything but feels like she's gotten
plenty of exercise.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, allow me to explain. First, don't make
eye contact with the cats. You've got to show
them you're not hostile.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Once they trust you, you can try a greeting. And
you've got to say it gently, like... "mew."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: M-mew.

text_block_list.name: Plump Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: ...Mew.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh! It responded!

With Seiun Sky's help, Air Groove manages a
clumsy conversation with the cat...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. I suppose this is as good a result as I
could expect. It was fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm not entirely convinced that cat language
exists.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy. Still won't accept it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, I do accept that your faculties for
perception and understanding are quite
something.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can tell how cats feel and call out to them
appropriately. It's astonishing in and of itself that
you're able to empathize with cats to such an
extent.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll need more time to draw my final conclusion...
but this was rather interesting—as is the notion of
cats speaking.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! She praised you, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but she wouldn't admit that cat language is
real. Though I guess things went purrretty well! ♪
